mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_event(user_id, movie_id, event_type, score, event_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{movieId}, #{eventType}, #{score}, #{eventTime})
mapper.select: SELECT movie_id FROM user_event WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND event_type = 'view' ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

select m.id as movieId, m.title, m.genres, m.year, max(ue.event_time) as eventTime from user_event ue join movie m on ue.movie_id = m.id where ue.user_id = #{userId} and ue.event_type = 'view' group by m.id, m.title, m.genres, m.year order by eventTime desc limit 50
